en: Now we're getting into real territory here.
ko: 이제 진짜 영역에 들어왔어. 응. 음.

en: This one's articular, right out of the gate.
Kansas don't know how to do no hot wings.
I feel it. Do you feel heat? I think I singed my eyebrow with that.
Shit. I'm now fucking crying over a fucking wing.
My eyes are tearing, Sean. Tears of happiness, Sean.
Oh my God, that's so hot. I think I'm losing my mind.
ko: 오, 세상에, 너무 매워. 정신이 나갈 것 같아.

en: How long have we been here? We've been here for three days.
I feel drunk on Kali Ento sauce.
I feel like a damn breech birth. I feel like I'm fucking coming out backwards.
Hold on. My goddamn heart rate's about 130.
What do you take for this? Almond milk.
ko: 이럴 땐 뭐 먹어? 아몬드 우유.
